use_codes.desc: IMPROVED WAKEFULNESS IN PATIENTS WITH EXCESSIVE SLEEPINESS ASSOCIATED WITH NARCOLEPSY, OBSTRUCTIVE SLEEP APNEA/HYPOPNEA SYNDROME, AND SHIFT WORK SLEEP DISORDER

indications.text:
NUVIGIL is indicated to improve wakefulness in adult patients with excessive sleepiness
associated with obstructive sleep apnea (OSA), narcolepsy, or shift work disorder (SWD).
Limitations of Use
In OSA, NUVIGIL is indicated to treat excessive sleepiness and not as treatment for the
underlying obstr...

NUVIGIL is indicated to improve wakefulness in patients with excessive sleepiness associated
with obstructive sleep apnea, narcolepsy and shift work disorder.
In OSA, NUVIGIL is indicated as an adjunct to standard treatment(s) for the underlying
